TAB Race Results

See all of today's horse racing results and dividends from all the major race meetings!

Updated in real time, Punters racing results delivers you all the intel you need for today's TAB race results the moment the horses cross the line.

Search by country, track, date or race number to instantly find the horse racing results you need. And from here you can also view the latest Melbourne Cup results.
